effects_provenance.raw: Garlic Cocktail THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Garlic Cocktail THCa Flower Strain? Savor the unique blend of Garlic Cocktail THCa Flower , an indica dominant hybrid strain (70% indica/30% sativa) born from the aromatic fusion of GMO and Mimosa. This strain earns its name from its distinctive flavor profile and potent genetic lineage, making it a must-try for any indica aficionado. Garlic Cocktail delivers a delightful mix of heavy herbal garlic taste, punctuated by a sharp citrus burst of tangerine on the exhale. The scent is equally captivating, featuring a dominant garlicky note, enhanced by hints of sour tangerines, spicy dank, and a touch of rich anise. Garlic Cocktail Terpenes The terpene composition of Garlic Cocktail adds depth to its sensory experience: Limonene : Infuses a zesty citrus scent, uplifting the mood and complementing the garlic with its stress-relieving properties. Caryophyllene: Offers a spicy, peppery aroma, enriching the garlic and citrus flavors while possibly providing anti-inflammatory benefits. Pinene : Contributes to the strain's piney, herbal notes, potentially aiding in alertness and memory retention. These terpenes not only define the aromatic and taste profile of Garlic Cocktail but also contribute to its overall therapeutic effects. Garlic Cocktail Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 23.89% Total Cannabinoids: 25.74% D9-THC: 0.18% Garlic Cocktail THCA Strain Effects Garlic Cocktail's effects are potent, setting in a few minutes post-inhalation, enveloping your mind in a wave of happy calm. It promotes a sense of bliss and uplifted mood, washing away any negative thoughts. Mental tranquility fosters creativity and sociability, making it great for social settings without overwhelming sedation. Physically, it induces a soothing relaxation, ideal for those seeking relief without deep sedation. With its high THCa content, Garlic Cocktail is particularly suitable for experienced users dealing with pain, inflammation, cramps, muscle spasms, and stress. Genotype: Garlic Cocktail (GMO x Mimosa) Phenotype: Garlic Cocktail This bud features fat, conical, minty green nugs with long, thin orange hairs and tiny, sparkling white crystal trichomes. effects_provenance.raw: Green Crack THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Green Crack THCa Flower Strain? Green Crack THCa Flower , often referred to by the less controversial name "Green Crush" or "Mango Crack," is a potent sativa-dominant hybrid strain born from the cross of Skunk #1 with an unknown indica. This strain is beloved for its energizing effects that keep you focused and motivated throughout the day. With a tangy, fruity flavor reminiscent of sweet mango, Green Crack is a daytime favorite for those looking to combat fatigue, stress, and low energy. Green Crack Strain Terpenes The terpene profile of Green Crack significantly contributes to its sensory appeal and effects: Myrcene : The most abundant terpene, it imparts an earthy, musky aroma, potentially enhancing the strain's relaxing yet uplifting effects. Caryophyllene: Offers a spicy, peppery note, enriching the flavor profile while possibly providing anti-inflammatory benefits. Pinene: Adds a refreshing pine scent, which may help with alertness and memory, counterbalancing the sedative qualities of Myrcene. These terpenes work together to create Green Crack's distinctive aroma and are key to its energizing and mood-enhancing properties. Green Crack Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 33.25% Total Cannabinoids: 34.64% D9-THC: 0.18% Green Crack THCA Strain Effects Green Crack delivers an invigorating mental buzz, known for its ability to sharpen focus and increase energy levels. It's perfect for daytime use when you need to get things done, be creative, or simply enjoy an uplifted mood without the drowsiness often associated with cannabis. The strain's effects are cerebral, promoting a sense of well-being, creativity, and motivation, making it a go-to for those battling lethargy or mental fog. effects_provenance.raw: Cake Bomb THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Cake Bomb THCA Flower is an indica-dominant hybrid bred from Do-Si-Dos crossed with PCS1 . The cross delivers a richly dessert-rich aromatic profile with the dense, dark-toned bud structure Do-Si-Dos genetics are known for — visually premium, deeply flavored, structurally serious. Effects Cake Bomb delivers a potent body high complemented by calming mental euphoria. The onset is steady and the body settles fully; the head stays warmly engaged rather than racing. Best reserved for evening use, post-dinner unwinding, or any setting where flavor character paired with real depth is the appeal. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: sweet vanilla up front, with creamy cake notes through the middle and a subtle warm-spice finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and unmistakably bakery-rich. The terpene profile reads vanilla-cream-and-spice — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Cake Bomb harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Cake Bomb THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Cake Bomb THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Cream indica Sweet Vanilla THCA Flower Lost In Translation

lineage_provenance.raw: hawg 3.5g introducing hawg thca flower by green dawg. this indica leaning hybrid was created from heavy og forward genetics. it packs a punch of pungent diesel fuel with notes of earthy herbs cracked pepper and a deep lingering gas. ◆ indica hybrid ◆ small batch premium indoor boutique creative euphoric no 15% flower green dawg

products.source_title: HAWG 3.5g

effects_provenance.raw: Peanut Butter Breath THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Peanut Butter Breath THCA Flower is a balanced hybrid bred from Dosidos crossed with Mendo Breath. The cross delivers a uniquely savory aromatic profile that stands apart from typical sweet hybrids — nutty, earthy, with the kind of dense, dark-toned bud structure that signals serious depth. Effects Peanut Butter Breath delivers a smooth cerebral high followed by a calming body buzz. The onset is gradual and warm, the body settles into comfortable ease, and the head stays warmly engaged rather than purely sedated. A strong cultivar for late-afternoon use, evening decompression, or flavor-led wind-down. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: rich nutty peanut-butter up front, with deep earthy undertones through the middle and a warm, slightly creamy finish on the exhale. Smoke is full and uniquely savory. The terpene profile reads nutty-and-earth — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Peanut Butter Breath harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Peanut Butter Breath THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Peanut Butter Breath THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Tier Preferred, Essential, Supreme Weight 28g, 28g (Smalls) THCA Flower

effects_provenance.raw: Quattro Kush THCa Flower 14G Quattro Kush THCa Flower Strain Quattro Kush is an Indica-dominant hybrid THCa strain known for its potent effects and robust flavors. It is a cross between three notable strains: 707 Headband x Triangle Kush x SFV OG Kush. The breeders behind this strain are Ethos Genetics. Quattro Kush THCa Flower made its appearance on the market through their efforts. Indica-dominant strains are typically associated with relaxation and sedation; Quattro Kush aligns with this profile. It leans heavily towards the indica side effects, offering a calming and relaxing experience. Click here for COA Appearance The appearance of Quattro Kush buds showcases the typical traits associated with indica strains. They tend to be dense and compact, often tightly packed. The flowers are typically vibrant green in color, adorned with a generous covering of trichomes that give them a frosty appearance. The strain may also feature hints of purple or orange, adding to its visual appeal. Aroma/Flavor Quattro Kush exhibits a complex and enticing aroma derived from its parent strains. The scent is spicy and skunky, with hints of diesel inherited from the 707 Headband. The earthy scents of Triangle Kush help mellow out the overall aroma. At the same time, SFV OG Kush contributes fresher citrus and pine flavors. The flavor profile of Quattro Kush is a harmonious combination of various elements. Spicy, woody notes dominate upon inhaling, followed by a subtle sweetness reminiscent of pears, which helps balance the intensity. There are herbal undertones on the exhale with a touch of tea-like flavors. Effects Quattro Kush THCa Flower is known for its powerful effects, so users should be prepared for an intense experience. It is popular among experienced cannabis enthusiasts who seek a more potent strain. Still, it can also be enjoyed by beginners in smaller doses. As an Indica-dominant strain, Quattro Kush delivers a profoundly relaxing and calming high. Users can expect a head-emptying effect that promotes a carefree and blissful state of mind upon consumption. The strain has euphoric properties that can induce laughter and make social interactions more enjoyable. Additionally, Quattro Kush stimulates appetite, so users may experience the case of munchies. It can be an excellent choice for relaxed gatherings with friends or indulging in stoned cooking sessions. Quattro Kush is best suited for expe
